title: tillandsia fendleri
intro: Tillandsia fendleri, also known as Fendler's airplant, is a species of epiphytic bromeliad native to Mexico and Texas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tillandsia fendleri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in teas, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis and bronchitis.
